### Welcome to the Curious Souls Café! ☕🌍

Thanks for bringing a new question to the table! Just a quick checklist before we add it to the deck. Please replace the `[ ]` with an `[x]` to confirm:

- [ ] I added the `[Online]` location tag at the very end of my question.
- [ ] This question is free of politics, religion, and personal info.

**Community Agreement:**
